title: Section 5
content: On and from the appointed day, in the First Schedule to the Constitution, under the heading "I. THE STATES", (a) in the paragraph relating to the territories of the State of Uttar Pradesh, after the words, brackets and figures "clause (a) of sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Bihar and Uttar Pradesh (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1968 (24 of 1968), the following shall be inserted, namely:-- "and the territories specified in section 3 of the Uttar Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000"; (b) after entry 26, the following entry shall be inserted, namely:-- "27. Uttaranchal: The territories specified in section 3 of the Uttar Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000.".
